target_games.match_1_teams: 讀賣巨人 vs 養樂多燕子
target_games.match_2_teams: 廣島東洋鯉魚 vs 橫濱海灣之星

primary_root_cause_detail: TSL source genuinely stopped returning target NPB games (3469930.1, 3469931.1) from its pre-game betting menu before the closing window opened. Last TSL snapshots: 3469930.1 @ 03:24:52Z (T-335min), 3469931.1 @ 04:55:09Z (T-245min). Zero snapshots were returned for either game during 07:00-09:00Z. The daemon was running correctly and calling TSL every 15 min with force_closing=True, but the source had no data to return.
secondary_root_cause_detail: OddsAPI MLB external daily closing: hard cap of 2 calls/day hit at 02:24Z. 2 calls consumed immediately after daemon restart at 02:09:35Z (P26G). All 8 closing-window cycles (07:10Z-08:56Z) blocked by: api_calls_today=2 >= cap=2.

ceo_hypothesis_evaluation.tsl_result: STARTUP_ONLY_TRIGGER_REFUTED — TSL called every 15 min throughout day
ceo_hypothesis_evaluation.odds_api_result: STARTUP_ONLY_TRIGGER_PLAUSIBLE_NOT_PROVED — 2 OddsAPI calls consumed at startup, creating startup-only appearance; root cause is QUOTA_HARD_CAP

daemon_heartbeat_clarifications.fetched_false_meaning: OddsAPI external closing not fetched — NOT that TSL did not run
daemon_heartbeat_clarifications.api_calls_today_scope: OddsAPI MLB external closing ONLY; does not reflect TSL
daemon_heartbeat_clarifications.next_trigger_minutes_null_meaning: Regex pattern finds no minutes in trigger_reason='cap=2 reached, calls=2'; expected when daily cap is blocked

source_removal_finding.markets_count_all_rows: 8-9 (all pregame rows, none in closing window)

p26_phase_closure.p26l_reason: Root causes fully identified; fixes are separate concern outside P26K scope

clv_sample_credibility.impact: NONE — count recovered to 223 (>220 baseline); CLV sample not degraded
